headline: Salesforce Lawsuit Against Microsoft Puts AI Workflow Ambitions In Focus
summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) and Slack have filed an antitrust lawsuit in the UK against Microsoft, challenging the bundling of Teams with other Microsoft products. The case follows earlier complaints to European authorities and targets how collaboration tools are packaged and sold to enterprise customers. The filing comes as Salesforce promotes its Agentforce platform and Google Cloud integrations for AI driven workflows across large organizations. For investors watching enterprise software, this...

headline: Will Deeper Gemini Integrations Across Clouds and Partners Change UiPath's (PATH) Automation Narrative
summary: In April 2026, UiPath disclosed a series of partnerships and product launches, including making its Intelligent Xtraction and Processing (IXP) available on Google Cloud Marketplace with Gemini as the default third‑party model, new AI-powered automation offerings on Salesforce’s AgentExchange, and deeper integrations with Deloitte and Databricks to connect data, testing, and automation in enterprise workflows. Together, these moves extend UiPath’s reach across major cloud and software...
